pokemon:iron-crown.name: Iron Crown
pokemon:iron-crown.summary: It resembles a mysterious object introduced in a paranormal magazine as a cutting-edge weapon shaped like a Cobalion.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It resembles a mysterious object introduced in a paranormal magazine as a cutting-edge weapon shaped like a Cobalion.
There was supposedly an incident in which it launched shining blades to cut everything around it to pieces. Little else is known about it.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It resembles a mysterious object introduced in a paranormal magazine as a cutting-edge weapon shaped like a Cobalion.

form:iron-crown.name: Iron Crown
form:iron-crown.summary: Iron Crown form with Steel / Psychic typing.
